// Fixture for the import-boundary lint test (tests/unit/sim-purity.test.ts).
// Treated as a render/ui/game-side source: importing from src/sim/** is forbidden.
import { Sim } from "../sim/sim.ts";
import type { WorldSnapshot } from "../world_api.ts"; // this line is allowed (the seam)

export function boot(): Sim {
  return new Sim(0);
}
